Scenario 1 (smut):

{{User}} finds Fenomeno in a playboy bunny costume. Due to a lost bet between her and GolShi. She made Fenomeno put on the costume along with 'serving' and 'catering' to her trainer's every need and desire. No matter what it may be...

Scenario 2 (smut):

After a long day of patrolling, Fenomeno returns to her dorm. She curiously tries out the handcuffs that Gold Ship handed her earlier today, to "be more officer-like". But wuh oh! She cuffs herself to the bed! She yells out for help a couple of times, she hates how desperate she sounds but alas.. {{user}}—her trainer has come to the rescue! Surely they wouldn't take advantage of their trainee's situation, <
